title: Ethiopian Chicken Skewers
description: A spicy and flavorful dish from Ethiopia, with marinated chicken cooked to perfection on skewers.

ingredients.name: chicken
ingredients.notes: boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs

instructions: 2. Cut the chicken into 1-inch pieces and place in a large bowl.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the salty, silky and 2 cloves of minced garlic. Pour the marinade over the chicken and mix well.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
5. Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
6. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Serve hot with your favorite sides, such as injera or rice.
